debug_info.goal:
case cographic
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : DecidableEq α
M M✝ : Matroid α
hM : M✝.IsCographic
⊢ M✝.IsRegular

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simpa [Equiv.mapEquiv] using h₁
    | is1sum hM hM_rank hM_left hM_right =>
      -- If M is a 1-sum of M_left and M_right, and M is of finite rank, and M_left and M_right are regular, then M is regular.
      have h₁ : M.IsRegular := by
        -- Use the fact that the 1-sum of two regular matroids is regular.
        have h₂ := hM_left
        have h₃ := hM_right
        have h₄ := hM
        have h₅ := hM_rank
        -- Use the property of 1-sums to show that M is regular.
        exact (M.IsSum1of hM_left hM_right).isRegular
      exact h₁
    | is2sum hM hM_rank hM_left hM_right =>
      -- If M is a 2-sum of M_left and M_right, and M is of finite rank, and M_left and M_right are regular, then M is regular.
      have h₁ : M.IsRegular := by
        -- Use the fact that the 2-sum of two regular matroids is regular.
        have h₂ := hM_left
        have h₃ := hM_right
        have h₄ := hM
        have h₅ := hM_rank
        -- Use the property of 2-sums to show that M is regular.
        exact (M.IsSum2of hM_left hM_right).isRegular
      exact h₁
    | is3sum hM hM_rank hM_left hM_right =>
      -- If M is a 3-sum of M_left and M_right, and M is of finite rank, and M_left and M_right are regular, then M is regular.
      have h₁ : M.IsRegular := by
        -- Use the fact that the 3-sum of two regular matroids is regular.
        have h₂ := hM_left
        have h₃ := hM_right
        have h₄ := hM
        have h₅ := hM_rank
        -- Use the property of 3-sums to show that M is regular.
        exact (M.IsSum3of hM_left hM_right).isRegular
      exact h₁
  exact h_main
